content:
Who am I? A forty-something years old engineer with electronics manufacturing background.
What is this repo? A collection of how-to notes, tutorials, learning resources about IT security, Linux, Python etc.
Why did I created it? I would not create another repo with a list of materials for “how to start in IT security” or “how to start in Bug Bounty” - there are way better sites/repositories for this:
 nahamsec 1ndianl33t s0md3v  This site is to
 track my suffering learning progress in bug bounty hunting (starting almost from zero) collect relevant resources get some experience with Hugo and GitHub practice writing in english  It is primarily for me, so don’t expect long posts describing everything. But, if you find something useful here, enjoy using it - on your own risk :)
title: Hello World!
